value.found_quote: Prompt Caching can reduce time-to-first-token latency by up to 80% and input token costs by up to 90%. It works automatically on all API requests and has no additional fees.
value.rationale: The page is a detailed OpenAI developer cookbook titled "Prompt Caching 201" that thoroughly documents OpenAI's prompt/context caching feature. It explicitly states that prompt caching reduces latency by up to 80% and input token costs by up to 90%, works automatically on all API requests, and is available for all recent models (gpt-4o and newer). The page covers caching mechanics, cost impact, latency impact, and optimization strategies — fully substantiating the claim that OpenAI offers prompt/context caching to cut latency and cost.
